appendix_metadata.bylaw_name: Land Use By-law for Beaver Bank, Hammonds Plains and Upper Sackville

content_text: APPENDIX A-1: EXISTING SENIOR CITIZENS HOUSING USES (RC-Sep 12/23;E-Oct 10/23) An Existing Senior Citizen Housing Use that was issued a development permit for Senior Citizens Housing prior to First Reading of this Appendix may only be re-issued for that use until May 23, 2026, and shall only be a permitted use for those properties listed below. Any expansion or alteration of an Existing Senior Citizen Housing use may only be considered if the number of dwelling units does not exceed the Total Number of Dwelling Units listed for the property below.
